data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"16:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nAll on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.\\nDo not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.\\nRole: inline.\\nImage grammar: example_comparison.\\nPurpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..\\nDiagram type: stage_evolution.\\nConcept summary: “Text to Speech API 现已可用”这句话看起来像普通发布，但如果你做过语音产品，就知道真正麻烦的从来不是让模型开口，而是让它在真实业务里稳定、可控、接得进去。xAI 这次给出的不是一句模糊的能力宣告，而是一个已经带着价格、速率限制和基础设施说明的入口：Grok….\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks.\\nKey relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.\\nLayout pattern: single_concept_centered.\\nDiagram focus: one section concept.\\nText position: integrated.\\nText budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.\\nHeadline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.\\nSubheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.\\nLabel budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.\\nLabel count budget: <= 6 labels.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"让它在真实业务里稳定、…\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"不是让模型开口\\\".\\nGrammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.\\nAdditional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这次更新值得关注，不是因为“自然声音”四个字本身，而是….\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\\nDo not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.\",\"resolution\":\"1K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
